skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.name: 仪礼剑
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.descri: 完成 2 个任务后解锁。消耗 150 点魔力值，将一把匕首临时替换为 15 秒仪礼剑，并获得速度 II。
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.name: 巨力
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.descriptio: 消耗 80 点魔力值，10 秒内空手左键玩家可击退并发动一次致命攻击。
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.name: 滑步
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.description: 消耗 30 点魔力值，获得 5 秒速度 III。
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.name: 杀意感知
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.descriptio: 消耗 60 点魔力值，15 秒内红色高亮 20 格内手持危险物品的玩家。
skill.sparkwitch.healing.name: 疗愈
skill.sparkwitch.healing.description: 消耗 40 点魔力值，20 秒内每秒恢复 8 格内好人 3 点理智。
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.name: 千里眼
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.descriptio: 消耗 80 点魔力值，淡蓝色高亮自己 30 秒，并白色高亮其他存活玩家 10 秒。
skill.sparkwitch.death_ray.name: 死亡射线
skill.sparkwitch.death_ray.description: 消耗 100 点魔力值，10 秒内左键可发射 3 次红色射线，范围 12 格，墙体会阻挡射线。

guidebook.sparkassist.credits.title: 鸣谢与许可
guidebook.sparkassist.credits.body:
指南书 UI 是基于 Rezelyn 及贡献者的 Wathe Extended 进行的洁净重写。

Selected Wathe visual assets are © 2024 doctor4t. Wathe source code is not copied or modified.

完整声明已随模组分发物与源码一并提供。

guidebook.sparkassist.faction.witch.name: 魔女阵营
guidebook.sparkassist.faction.pending: 这个阵营页面已经准备好接入完整的玩家手册正文。
Wraith is a special role that is never assigned at round start. Once a death is confirmed, players whose pre-death effective alignment was GOOD (Civilian), KILLER, or WITCH may convert under the same eligibility rules.

Administrators can set conversion chance with /sparkwitch:ghostChance <0..100>, the minimum starting-player count with /sparkwitch:ghostMinRequirement <non-negative count>, and the player divisor with /wathe:gameSettings set roleDividend ghost <n>. Defaults are 75%, 10 players, and 5.
If the starting player count is below minimum, the round quota is 0; otherwise it is floor(starting players / n). Each player can consume at most one quota slot per round.
Starting player count and chance, minimum, and dividend are snapshotted when the round begins. Mid-round changes apply next round, and a restored round keeps its original snapshot.

Escapes, voluntary train exits, end-of-round digestion, and other ineligible deaths do not convert. Conversion first uses the safe location recorded at round start, falling back to the corpse or digestion location only when necessary.
When SparkTraits is installed, conversion preserves pre-death traits and adds Cautious. The current role becomes Wraith, while remaining inventory, money, and mana are cleared.

Base Wraiths enter Adventure mode and continuously receive invisibility, no collision, invulnerability, Slowness II, and Blindness. Promotion removes Slowness and Blindness, but the active Wraith state remains.

Base Wraiths and every promoted role except Guardian Angel cannot send text chat. An active promoted Guardian Angel may open and use text chat and keeps the existing dead-voice exception; receiving rules are unchanged.

Base Wraiths and all five promoted roles obey the map no-jump setting and do not create walking, landing, or sprinting ground particles. External movement such as wind charges and ability particles are unaffected.

Every stage cannot pick up ground items and keeps no collision, invulnerability, and player-affect isolation. Wind Spirit charges may affect ordinary living participants but never a base or promoted Wraith.

Only base (restricted) Wraiths and promoted Vendettas project other players, bodies, and model layers as the default wide-arm Steve and hide names. Wind Spirit, Guardian Angel, Saboteur, and Curser show real skins. Projection never changes the real skin.
Wraith restores the previous tasks and keeps at least 3 distinct tasks. The third task completed after conversion triggers promotion.
GOOD Wraiths randomly promote to Wind Spirit, Guardian Angel, or Vendetta when its target requirement is met. KILLER Wraiths promote only to Saboteur. WITCH Wraiths promote only to Curser.

Promotion announces the new role, restores ordinary right-click interactions, and changes vision to partial grayscale. Map no-jump, ground-particle, pickup, and player-isolation rules remain active; only Guardian Angel gains the text-chat exception.

Before a round, administrators can use /sparkwitch:forcePromotion <promotion role> <players> to lock each player's future promotion for that round. It does not change the role immediately: the player must still convert naturally into a Wraith and complete the third task, when the selected role overrides the random pool. A successful promotion consumes the lock; an unused lock expires during round cleanup.
guidebook.sparkassist.sparkwitch.wind_sp: Wind Spirit is one of three random GOOD Wraith promotions. It belongs to the Civilian faction and wins with Civilians; KILLER and WITCH Wraiths cannot promote to Wind Spirit.
Permanently has Speed II. A higher Speed effect is preserved, and Speed II returns when it ends.
The shop sells one vanilla Wind Charge for 50 money with unlimited purchases and no shop cooldown.

Vanilla wind charges fired by Wind Spirit affect ordinary living, participating players, but never base Wraiths or any promoted Wraith role. Owners, true spectators, dead or removed players, bodies, and non-player entities are not added as targets. The charge uses only vanilla direct-hit and explosion knockback and deals no additional damage.
Has the normal Wathe Instinct vision while still obeying existing Instinct-hiding rules.
Immune to blackout Blindness, gains Night Vision during blackout, and has unlimited stamina.
Each task completed after promotion grants 50 money.
Wind Spirit shows real player and body skins rather than the base Wraith Steve projection. Shared text-chat, no-jump, and ground-particle restrictions remain active.
guidebook.sparkassist.sparkwitch.guardia: Guardian Angel is one of three random GOOD Wraith promotions. It belongs to the Civilian faction and wins with Civilians.
Has unlimited stamina, is immune to blackouts, and can identify poisoned food, drinks, and beds.

After a 60-second promotion delay, aim at a living player within 3 blocks and press the role ability key to apply a hidden protective shield for 10 seconds. A successful use has a 90-second cooldown. The protected target is outlined through walls in the Guardian Angel role color and is visible only to the Guardian Angel.

An active promoted Guardian Angel may open and use text chat. It also keeps its voice exception and can talk with the dead in the hidden Wathe dead/spectator voice group instead of joining living proximity voice.
Guardian Angel shows real player and body skins rather than the Steve projection. Shared no-jump, ground-particle, and pickup restrictions remain active.
guidebook.sparkassist.sparkwitch.vendett: Vendetta is a conditional GOOD Wraith promotion: it enters the random pool only when the killer bound at the first death still meets the target requirements. Vendetta belongs to the Civilian faction.
Vendetta keeps the Steve projection: other players, bodies, and model layers appear as the default wide-arm Steve with hidden names, without changing real skins.
The world becomes grayscale with distance. The bound target outline is composited after grayscale, so it remains pure #FF0000 instead of being desaturated.
The bound killer has a persistent red through-wall outline within 4 blocks and is also outlined for 5 seconds after each new 30-second countdown ends.

Only Vendetta and the killer responsible for the first death can affect one another. The Vendetta Knife can succeed once: hold use for at least 0.5 seconds, then release to stab the bound killer within 3 blocks and line of sight.
The Vendetta Knife reuses the dynamic ordinary-knife model wrapper from Wathe for external skin mods. It adds no fixed static knife skin and preserves the existing held-item transforms.
Vendetta remains subject to shared text-chat, voice, no-jump, ground-particle, and pickup restrictions.
guidebook.sparkassist.sparkwitch.saboteu: Saboteur is the only KILLER Wraith promotion. It belongs to the Killer faction and wins with Killers; GOOD and WITCH Wraiths cannot promote to Saboteur.
The shop always contains one Lockpick for 50 money and keeps the vanilla Wathe Blackout entry. Blackout price, activation, and shared cooldown remain controlled by Wathe.

Promotion starts a 60-second cooldown. Once ready, press the role ability key to sabotage every currently powered light allowed by Wathe within a 20-block spherical radius at the moment of use, then start a 120-second cooldown.
Using Sabotage when no eligible lights are nearby still succeeds and consumes the full cooldown, so failure does not reveal whether lights exist nearby.

Sabotage and the vanilla Wathe Blackout are independent. If they overlap, a light returns only after both effects end. Sabotage does not trigger the global countdown, Blindness, Night Vision, or the shared Wathe Blackout cooldown.

Sabotage does not affect torches, redstone lamps, held-item dynamic lights, or lights from other mods. The lower-right HUD shows only the current cooldown or the actually bound role ability key when ready.
Each task completed after promotion grants 50 money; the task that triggered promotion is not rewarded retroactively.
Saboteur shows real player and body skins rather than the Steve projection. Shared text-chat, voice, no-jump, ground-particle, and pickup restrictions remain active.
Curser is the only WITCH Wraith promotion. It belongs to the Witch faction and wins with Witches; it no longer appears in the KILLER Wraith promotion pool.
Curser shows real player and body skins rather than the Steve projection. Shared text-chat, voice, no-jump, ground-particle, and pickup restrictions remain active.
